text: Contract nuance accepted: conditionEstimate(singular A) = Right(Double.PositiveInfinity) rather than Left(SingularMatrix) — kappa is genuinely infinite, the total answer is the more honest one; Left remains for structural errors (non-square). Hager estimator factors both A and A-transpose once (two LUs, O(few) solves) since no transpose-solve primitive exists yet; revisit if P5/P6 adds one. DenseWorkspace.forQR keeps its cols param for the P5 thin-QR tau buffer.
